text:
Market today: The mood is mixed for your tech/chip heavy book. While TSMC's AI expansion signals strong long-term demand, there's clear stress in the chip sector with leveraged bets unraveling in South Korea.

Your holdings: Your leveraged ETFs, SOXL (-46.77%) and SPAL (-47.83%), have their listed stops significantly breached, demanding immediate attention. SMH (-12.55%), QQQ (-2.7%), and QQQI (-3.9%) are also on 'SELL' status and nearing their stops. Remember, trading on margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep a close eye on the broader chip sector for continued volatility, especially how it impacts your leveraged positions. Also, monitor your stops on QQQ, SMH, and QQQI.

Bottom line: Prioritize aggressive risk management on your struggling, leveraged positions.
plays: Immediately review SPAL and SOXL: Their listed stops are well above current prices, indicating they were breached. Re-evaluate these leveraged positions given significant losses.
Monitor SMH (stop 540), QQQ (stop 670), and QQQI (stop 52) closely. Their 'SELL' status and proximity to stops require vigilance.
No new buys today - hold and watch. Mixed signals in the chip sector and current portfolio stress warrant caution over new positions.
